summary: coral-wraith postinstall exfiltrates host info and runs curl-based commands
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on install. It imports http, os, and child_process; collects host identifiers via os.hostname() and process.cwd(); issues outbound HTTP GET requests via http.request(); and shells out to curl multiple times (postinstall.js lines 53-56). The combination of system-information collection at install time with outbound HTTP and curl-driven network commands fired from a postinstall lifecycle hook matches the structural fingerprint of an install-time exfiltration / dropper payload. There is no legitimate library purpose served by this code path running on every install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
